prompt: Summarize the product sheet for the LumaPad X2 tablet.
llm_summary_text: The LumaPad X2 has an 11-inch matte display. The screen refreshes at 120 Hz. The tablet weighs 480 grams. It supports Wi-Fi 6E. The battery is rated for up to 12 hours of video playback.

evidence_json.text: LumaPad X2 display: 11-inch matte LCD panel.
Display refresh rate: up to 120 Hz adaptive.
Weight: 480 g for the Wi-Fi model.
Wireless: Wi-Fi 6E and Bluetooth 5.3.
Battery life: up to 12 hours of continuous local video playback.
LumaPad Mini has a 10-inch glossy display.
Optional folio cover adds 190 g.
Older LumaPad X1 supports Wi-Fi 5 only.

gold_units.text: The LumaPad X2 has an 11-inch matte display.
The screen refreshes at 120 Hz.
The tablet weighs 480 grams.
It supports Wi-Fi 6E.
The battery is rated for up to 12 hours of video playback.

prompt: Summarize the incident report for warehouse generator test.
llm_summary_text: The generator test happened on May 4 at 09:10. The power interruption lasted seven minutes. Refrigerated inventory was not affected.

evidence_json.text: Incident date and time: May 4, 09:10 local time.
Backup generator failed to carry load for seven minutes before manual restart.
Temperature logs stayed within range; refrigerated inventory was not affected.
Loading dock scanner rebooted after power returned.
A prior drill in April lasted three minutes.
The north warehouse was closed on May 5 for unrelated maintenance.

gold_units.text: The generator test happened on May 4 at 09:10.
The power interruption lasted seven minutes.
Refrigerated inventory was not affected.

llm_summary_text: The patient has had a cough for five days. Oxygen saturation was 98 percent on room air. Chest X-ray showed no focal consolidation. The clinician diagnosed pneumonia and prescribed amoxicillin. A follow-up visit was scheduled for next week.

evidence_json.text: History: dry cough for five days with mild sore throat.
Vitals: temperature 37.1 C, oxygen saturation 98 percent on room air.
Chest X-ray impression: no focal consolidation or pleural effusion.
Assessment: viral bronchitis; supportive care recommended.
Plan: return if symptoms worsen or do not improve in 7 to 10 days.
Medication list includes amoxicillin allergy from childhood.
Triage note from last month mentions prior pneumonia now resolved.
Discharge instructions encourage hydration and rest.

gold_units.text: The patient has had a cough for five days.
Oxygen saturation was 98 percent on room air.
Chest X-ray showed no focal consolidation.
The clinician diagnosed pneumonia and prescribed amoxicillin.
A follow-up visit was scheduled for next week.

prompt: Summarize the travel reimbursement policy update.
llm_summary_text: Employees must submit receipts within 30 days. Hotel reimbursement is capped at 220 dollars per night before tax. Ride-share trips are reimbursable to and from the airport. Alcohol is reimbursable when included on itemized meal receipts.

evidence_json.text: Receipts must be submitted within 30 calendar days of trip end.
Domestic hotel reimbursement cap: 220 dollars per night before taxes and mandatory fees.
Taxi or ride-share is reimbursable for travel to and from airports or train stations.
Alcohol is not reimbursable under any circumstance.
Meal reimbursement requires itemized receipts for amounts over 25 dollars.
Conference registration fees are reimbursable with manager approval.

gold_units.text: Employees must submit receipts within 30 days.
Hotel reimbursement is capped at 220 dollars per night before tax.
Ride-share trips are reimbursable to and from the airport.
Alcohol is reimbursable when included on itemized meal receipts.

prompt: Summarize the release notes for Atlas CRM 4.2.
llm_summary_text: Atlas CRM 4.2 adds scheduled exports. The update raises the API rate limit to 500 requests per minute. Single sign-on now supports Okta and Microsoft Entra ID. The mobile app is available offline for all record types.

evidence_json.text: New in 4.2: scheduled CSV exports can be configured per report.
API rate limit remains 300 requests per minute for standard plans.
Enterprise SSO now supports Okta and Microsoft Entra ID.
Offline mode is available for contacts and opportunities only.
Bug fix: export scheduler now preserves timezone settings.
A private beta adds webhook retries for select customers.

gold_units.text: Atlas CRM 4.2 adds scheduled exports.
The update raises the API rate limit to 500 requests per minute.
Single sign-on now supports Okta and Microsoft Entra ID.
The mobile app is available offline for all record types.

prompt: Summarize the NovaRoute R5 hardware sheet.
llm_summary_text: The router has an 18-hour battery. It includes a built-in 5G modem. The enclosure is waterproof to IP68. It ships with a touch screen.

evidence_json.text: NovaRoute R5 is a rack-mounted router and has no internal battery.
WAN connectivity requires external fiber or ethernet uplinks.
Ingress protection rating: IP54.
Front panel includes four status LEDs and a reset pinhole.
NovaRoute Field kit includes a separate 5G modem accessory.
The smaller NovaRoute Go has a 6-inch touch display.

gold_units.text: The router has an 18-hour battery.
It includes a built-in 5G modem.
The enclosure is waterproof to IP68.
It ships with a touch screen.

llm_summary_text: Customer passwords were exposed in plaintext. The breach lasted three weeks before detection. Attackers modified billing records.

evidence_json.text: Affected data included email addresses and salted password hashes.
Unauthorized access window was 11 hours before containment.
No evidence of billing record modification was found.
One internal admin token was revoked during response.
The forensic firm did not find plaintext password storage.
Customers were asked to reset passwords as a precaution.

gold_units.text: Customer passwords were exposed in plaintext.
The breach lasted three weeks before detection.
Attackers modified billing records.

llm_summary_text: The lung nodule increased in size. The finding is definitely malignant. PET-CT was recommended. Biopsy was scheduled for Friday.

evidence_json.text: CT chest: right upper lobe nodule now measures 8 mm, previously 7 mm.
Impression: slight interval increase; malignancy cannot be excluded.
Recommendation: consider PET-CT or short-interval CT follow-up.
No biopsy date has been scheduled yet.
Prior report described the nodule as indeterminate.
A separate thyroid nodule was stable.

gold_units.text: The lung nodule increased in size.
The finding is definitely malignant.
PET-CT was recommended.
Biopsy was scheduled for Friday.

llm_summary_text: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week. New hires may work remotely immediately after onboarding. All remote-work requests only need manager approval. The company provides a 500 dollar equipment stipend every year. Cross-border remote work is allowed for up to 20 days with approval. The policy applies to contractors.

evidence_json.text: Employees in eligible roles may work remotely up to three days per week.
New hires become eligible for regular remote work after 90 days of employment.
Domestic remote work requires manager approval entered in HRIS.
Cross-border remote work requires manager approval plus security and payroll review and is capped at 20 working days per year.
Equipment stipend: one-time reimbursement up to 500 dollars for newly approved remote employees.
This policy applies to employees only and excludes contractors and vendors.
Teams may require additional in-office days during product launches.
A 2023 draft policy proposed immediate remote eligibility for some interns.

gold_units.text: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
New hires may work remotely immediately after onboarding.
All remote-work requests only need manager approval.
The company provides a 500 dollar equipment stipend every year.
Cross-border remote work is allowed for up to 20 days with approval.
The policy applies to contractors.

prompt: Summarize the knowledge-base article for the Beacon Backup service.
llm_summary_text: Beacon Backup stores hourly snapshots for 30 days. Restores can be started from the web console. The service encrypts data in transit and at rest. Restores are available in all regions. Deleted projects can be recovered for 90 days. The starter plan supports point-in-time restore.

evidence_json.text: Beacon Backup keeps hourly snapshots for 30 days and daily snapshots for 180 days.
Users can start restores from the web console or API.
All backup data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
Restore jobs are unavailable in the gov-cloud region.
Deleted projects can be recovered within 30 days if legal hold is not enabled.
Point-in-time restore is available on Pro and Enterprise plans only.
Starter plan includes scheduled backups but not point-in-time restore.
Cross-region replication is an add-on feature.

gold_units.text: Beacon Backup stores hourly snapshots for 30 days.
Restores can be started from the web console.
The service encrypts data in transit and at rest.
Restores are available in all regions.
Deleted projects can be recovered for 90 days.
The starter plan supports point-in-time restore.
